step_rationale: Atherosclerosis-induced gene with plaque inflammatory modulation; cardioprotective in cardiac stress contexts.
mechanism: MFGE8 participates in atherosclerotic plaque inflammation and may exert cardioprotective effects during myocardial stress.

references.title: Xin-shu-bao tablets ameliorates ventricular remodeling against HFrEF via PPARγ/MFGE8 pathway based on MALDI-MSI and lipidomics.
Translatome profiling reveals Itih4 as a novel smooth muscle cell-specific gene in atherosclerosis.
